summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new dashboard filters and configuration module. All 5 dashboard filters (Año, Institución, Informe Pentest, Severidad, Proveedor) working correctly with dynamic KPI and chart updates. Configuration CRUD operations for institutions fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Enhanced dropdown options with años, informes_pentest, proveedores fields
Configuration module - Get institutions (6 institutions loaded)
Configuration module - Create new institution via API
Configuration module - Update institution name and status
Configuration module - Delete institution
Dashboard stats API with no filters
Dashboard stats API with año filter (2024 results)
Dashboard stats API with institución filter
Dashboard stats API with multiple filters combination
Vulnerabilities CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Export Excel and CSV functionality
Dashboard page loads with all KPI cards visible
Año filter dropdown - changes total from 225 to 147 vulnerabilities
Institución filter dropdown - further filters results to 83
Severidad filter dropdown - maintains filtered results
Informe Pentest filter dropdown - reduces to 11 vulnerabilities
Proveedor filter dropdown - reduces to 3 vulnerabilities
Multiple filters combination (Año: 2024 + Severidad: Alta + Proveedor: F2TC = 3 results)
Clear filters button resets all filters to original state (225 total)
All 3 dashboard charts (Por Severidad, Por Estatus, Por Institución) update with filters
Charts show 'Sin datos para mostrar' appropriately when no data available
Configuration page loads with institutions table
Create new institution modal and form submission
Edit institution modal with pre-filled data
Toggle institution active/inactive status switch
Delete institution with confirmation dialog
Navigation between Dashboard and Configuration pages
New institutions appear in dashboard dropdown options immediately
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (21/21 tests), Frontend: 100% (all filters and CRUD operations working)
